sentences.arabic: الْقِصَصُ الْقَصِيرَةُ تُعَلِّمُنَا دُرُوساً مُفِيدَةً فِي الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Kratke priče nas uče korisnim lekcijama u životu.
sentences.translationEn: Short stories teach us useful lessons in life.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَدُّ يَحْكِي لَنَا حِكَايَاتٍ رَائِعَةً كُلَّ مَسَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Djed nam je svake večeri pričao divne priče.
sentences.translationEn: The grandfather used to tell us wonderful tales every evening.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَجْلِسُ حَوْلَهُ وَنَسْتَمِعُ بِاهْتِمَامٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Sjedimo oko njega i slušamo s velikim zanimanjem.
sentences.translationEn: We sit around him and listen with great interest.
These stories make the imagination vast.

sentences.translation: Čitanje je ključ znanja i kulture.
sentences.translationEn: Reading is the key to knowledge and culture.
